reasoning_model_1: The model generates the correct text content: 'This discovery will fundamentally change our perception of the world!' (00:00-00:04). model_comparison: Both models read the text accurately and fluently. The key differentiator is the interpretation of 'emphatic rhythm'. Model 1 (T1) interprets the rhythm as slow and spaced out, but the vocal quality is too soft and breathy, lacking the forcefulness required for an 'emphatic' delivery. It sounds more like a gentle narration. Model 2 (T2), on the other hand, delivers the line with clear conviction, strong stress on the keyword 'fundamentally', and a driving rhythm that conveys the weight of the discovery.
